cold_watch.immediate_felt_reaction: The opening should make a creator recognize editing friction immediately.
cold_watch.moment_of_curiosity: The first caption implies there is a faster way to make the clip usable.
cold_watch.moment_of_confusion_or_boredom: The sample fixture has no real footage, so this remains a low-confidence placeholder observation.
cold_watch.most_memorable_image: Raw footage becoming a polished captioned short.

evidence_timeline.viewer_perception: The viewer recognizes repetitive editing labor.

core_mechanism.name: workflow compression
core_mechanism.why_it_catches_attention: It starts with a familiar editing bottleneck.
core_mechanism.why_it_might_persuade: It promises visible reduction in manual work.
core_mechanism.what_cannot_be_copied: Any competitor wording, visual identity, or exact proof scene.

scores.improvement_note: Real analysis must cite first-frame and first-caption evidence.

drop_off_hypotheses: CTA appears after the likely midpoint retention drop.
risks_and_unknowns: Sample fixture only; no real performance data.
